letter:
Happy Birthday bujji☺️💕

Life became more beautiful the day you came into it.🥹You are the reason behind my smiles, my peace, and my strength.
 🥰Thank you for loving me unconditionally and making every day feel special🤗.
Your kindness, your hard work, and the way you always care for our happiness before your own makes me 🥲…..♥️

images.caption: Your smile is my favorite kind of peace 🕊️
